display_text: Dawnbreaker Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Solar Guardian's heal per pulse and makes the aura follow Dawnbreaker for 2s after landing. This upgrade counters anti-heal mechanics and prolonged teamfight sustain, allowing Dawnbreaker to consistently heal allies even while repositioning.
search_text: Dawnbreaker Aghanim Scepter anti-heal teamfight sustain heal per pulse repositioning

display_text: Dawnbreaker Aghanim's Shard: Grants debuff immunity, 50% magic resistance, and free movement during Starbreaker, though slowed by 35%. This upgrade counters magic burst and disables, turning Dawnbreaker into a durable initiator who can disrupt enemies without fear of being interrupted or bursted down.
search_text: Dawnbreaker Aghanim Shard debuff immunity magic resistance anti-disable free movement initiation
